% fig_lec05_flow.tex — One-parameter group of diffeomorphisms Φ_t on M
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec05_flow.jl
%
% Surface  M = graph of  z = 0.5·cos(0.9·x) + 0.35·sin(0.6·y).
% Vector field on M (chart coords):
%     V^u = 0.85 + 0.15·v,   V^v = 0.55·cos(0.7·u),
% lifted by Φ(u,v) = (u,v,h(u,v)).
% Three points along the orbit C_p(t) = Φ_t(p):
%     p,  Φ_t(p)  at  t = 1.6,   Φ_{t+s}(p)  at  t+s = 3.3.
% Tangent vector v|_p drawn at p.
%
% This shows simultaneously: the vector field v on M, the integral curve
% through p, the group property Φ_s ∘ Φ_t = Φ_{t+s} (read left-to-right
% along the curve), and v|_p as the tangent to the orbit at t = 0.

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
      width=10.5cm, height=6.4cm,
      view={-32}{34},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty,
      clip=false,
  ]
    % Manifold (faded mesh)
    \addplot3[
        surf, opacity=0.30, shader=interp,
        colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot,
    ] table {data/lec05_flow_surface.dat};

    % Sparse vector field arrows on M
    \addplot3[
        quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
        -{Stealth[length=3.5pt, width=2.4pt]},
        cgblue!75, line width=0.55pt,
        no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec05_flow_field.dat};

    % Integral curve C_p(t) = Φ_t(p)
    \addplot3[munsell, line width=1.3pt, no markers, forget plot]
      table {data/lec05_flow_orbit_M.dat};

    % Tangent vector v|_p at p (the lifted field value)
    \addplot3[
        quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
        -{Stealth[length=5.5pt, width=3.5pt]},
        banana!70!black, line width=1.0pt,
        no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec05_flow_tangent_p.dat};

    % Three marked points along the orbit
    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.7pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec05_flow_points_M.dat};

    % Labels
    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet]
      at (axis cs:-2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!55!black, anchor=north east]
      at (axis cs:-2.05,-0.30,-0.20) {$p$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!55!black, anchor=south west]
      at (axis cs:-0.65,0.20,0.55) {$\Phi_t(p)$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!55!black, anchor=south west]
      at (axis cs:0.95,1.10,0.62) {$\Phi_{t+s}(p)$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!50!black, anchor=south]
      at (axis cs:-1.55,-0.20,0.10) {$v|_p$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=munsell, anchor=west]
      at (axis cs:-1.85,1.30,-0.25) {orbit $C_p$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=cgblue!75!black, anchor=south west]
      at (axis cs:-2.55,2.10,-0.05) {field $v$};
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
